pr.title: Add 11L Shared Sparse Sidecar + EMA + AdamW TTT (1.0916 mean)

output.summary: Adds a shared gated sparse sidecar reused at late layers for local refinement conditioned per site atop the AdamW-TTT 11-layer trunk.
techniques: Shared sparse refinement module reused across multiple late insertion sites
Site-specific embeddings and residual scales modulate the shared pathway
Gate→value→depthwise conv→proj path keeps overhead low under 16MB cap
